title: The Origins of Sounding Canvas
excerpt: An archival exploration of the earliest Sounding Canvas experiments that eventually led to the creation of Perceptrum. This story traces the transition from technical research and augmented musical instruments toward interactive paintings, spatial sound, and relational artistic environments.

title: The Epistemology of Touch: Reclaiming the Relational Object
excerpt: A theoretical reflection on touch, relational objects, augmented paintings, and post-immersive scenography developed through the artistic research of Perceptrum².

title: Sounding Canvas at Norrsken | Perceptrum² Live Event (June 4)
excerpt: A conversation at Norrsken about our practice: from demonstration to a relational and epistemological shift. Through our Augmented Painting, Sounding Canvas, we explore how invisible computation can activate physical space and redefine interaction as embodied co-presence.
